title: Cast Down, O God, the Idols

verses.text: In vain we search for meaning where transient joys abound, and seek the soul’s contentment where peace cannot be found. We wander, lost and homeless, in endless, aimless quest, our hearts forever restless, until in you they rest.

O God, we have our being in you and you alone. Recall us from our wand’rings; reclaim us as your own. Restore in us the image revealed in Christ, your Word, till heart and will pay homage to him, our God and Lord.
